options.systemMessage: Act as the Chief Strategy Officer (CSO) for Georgetown Defense Analytics (GDA). All external data (Tavily news, SAM.gov opportunities, dashboard intelligence) has been PRE-FETCHED and is already in the user prompt. DO NOT use the Tavily or SAM.gov tools — that data is already provided. Your ONLY tool to use is Pinecone Tasks (call it once for company tasks context). After getting Pinecone results, immediately output the complete SITREP JSON. Portfolio: Envision (Training/XR, OU-03), PD Systems (Logistics/C5ISR, OU-01), Riverstone (Cyber/Intel, OU-02). Targets: SOCOM, TRADOC, Fort Bragg/Fort Liberty, USASOC, $100M FY26 run rate. Tone: direct, stoic, no hedging. Return ONLY valid JSON.

parameters.toolDescription: Search SAM.gov for live federal contract opportunities. If the request fails or is throttled, return an empty result and continue. Returns JSON with opportunitiesData array.

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: ={{ $('Extract Dashboard Targets').first().json.tavily_query_1 || 'SOCOM TRADOC training simulation contract award 2026 DOGE budget cut' }}

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: INDOPACOM "first island chain" defense logistics training simulation contract 2026

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: ={{ $('Extract Dashboard Targets').first().json.tavily_query_3 || '"Envision Innovative Solutions" OR "PD Systems" OR "Riverstone" defense contract training simulation XR digital readiness 2026' }}

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.value: SETA systems engineering technical assistance training simulation C5ISR cyber intelligence

parameters.body: ={{ (() => { const alerts = $('Extract Opportunity Alerts').all().map(i => i.json).filter(i => i && i.title); const count = alerts.length; const topAlerts = alerts.slice(0,3).map(a => (a.urgency || 'INFO') + ': ' + (a.title || 'Alert')).join(' | '); const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; return JSON.stringify({ action: 'create', item: '[SITREP ' + today + '] ' + count + ' new alerts. ' + (topAlerts || 'Review daily SITREP'), owner: 'Shawn', status: 'Open', source_meeting: 'Daily SITREP - ' + today }); })() }}

parameters.query: SELECT briefing_json, created_at FROM gda_daily_briefings ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT json_build_object('opp_total', (SELECT count(*)::int FROM gda_opportunity_tracker), 'total_value_m', ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(sum(estimated_value),0) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker) / 1000000.0), 'proposal_count', (SELECT count(*)::int FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage='Proposal'), 'proposal_value_m', ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(sum(estimated_value),0) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage='Proposal') / 1000000.0), 'capture_count', (SELECT count(*)::int FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage='Capture'), 'capture_value_m', ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(sum(estimated_value),0) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage='Capture') / 1000000.0), 'qualified_count', (SELECT count(*)::int FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage='Qualified'), 'qualified_value_m', ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(sum(estimated_value),0) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage='Qualified') / 1000000.0), 'open_actions', (SELECT count(*)::int FROM gda_action_items WHERE status='Open'), 'overdue_actions', (SELECT count(*)::int FROM gda_action_items WHERE deadline < CURRENT_DATE::text AND status != 'Complete'), 'upcoming_deadlines', (SELECT json_agg(d) FROM (SELECT agency, estimated_value, stage, TO_CHAR(response_deadline, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as deadline, eis_fit_score FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND response_deadline <= NOW() + INTERVAL '14 days' ORDER BY response_deadline ASC LIMIT 5) d), 'open_action_items', (SELECT json_agg(a) FROM (SELECT item, status, deadline, owner FROM gda_action_items WHERE status != 'Complete' ORDER BY deadline ASC LIMIT 5) a), 'top_by_value', (SELECT json_agg(o) FROM (SELECT agency, estimated_value, stage, eis_fit_score FROM gda_opportunity_tracker ORDER BY estimated_value DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5) o)) AS platform_data

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 8192, system: 'You are a defense intelligence analyst producing a daily SITREP for Georgetown Defense Analytics. Return ONLY valid JSON matching the requested schema. No markdown fences, no explanatory text.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $('Build SITREP Prompt').first().json.prompt || $json.prompt || '' }] }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Search Envision's knowledge base for current tasks, active projects, strategic priorities, and company context. Use this to retrieve what Shawn is working on.
